falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes above 5,500 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would indicate bullish momentum contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and pattern similarity to a historical bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% with a 3-day close above the 20-day moving average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal strong risk-on sentiment and invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear trend divergence from the historical pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Index drops below 18.0 with a 5-day closing range of less than 5 points
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such low volatility would contradict the 'blowoff score' of 40 and indicate market complacency invalidating the current risk-warning posture

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
